The two man team we had on both days were exceptional and treated our belongings with care and respect.

Make sure comms are clear on your truck size.
Measure if in doubt. We did.

Once we got past that hurdle, we made a happy compromise of tagging the last of our shift in a second truck.

I would highly recommend Smart Movers company as an affordable and fast mover.  The moving teams are great at what they do master Tetris players.

Thank you for your feedback.

For clarity, your move from Pick-Up address to the storage facility was completed in full, with you present throughout the job. The property involved stairs, which naturally slows down loading and unloading; however, based on the scope and conditions of your move, the job was still completed within — and in fact faster than — the average time typically required for a move of this nature.

The need for an additional storage unit was due to the size of the unit booked, not due to stacking issues. Even with efficient stacking, the total volume exceeded the capacity of a single unit.

Regarding handling, our team worked in line with safe manual-handling practices. Protective equipment is available and used as required based on item type and condition.

Importantly, no damage was reported to our management during or after the move, and no formal concern or claim was raised at any time following completion.

While we respect that you later used a different provider and may have had a different experience, comparisons made after the fact do not always reflect the conditions and constraints present on the original move day.

Kind regards 
Smart movers team

An invoice/receipt was issued from Smart Movers, including GST, and we can provide proof that it was sent to you.

Regarding the timing, our records show the job ran from 8:15 am to 1:20 pm. If you felt there was an overcharge or that time should have been deducted, we would have appreciated you raising this immediately with the on-site team or by calling our office so it could be addressed at the time.

We always aim to provide fair, transparent service, and we regret that you feel dissatisfied in this instance.
